prompt: A photorealistic, deeply uncanny sci-fi astrophysical landscape. Four distinct, isolated, strictly elliptical asteroid masses of drastically varying sizes (from a tiny sparse top-left ellipse to a massive hyper-dense bottom-right ellipse) are suspended in a deep void. Their centers of mass are pierced by a razor-straight, luminous accretion jet tracking a negative global regression line, plunging downward from top-left to bottom-right. Every asteroid is composed entirely of jagged, crystalline geological striations. Crucially, every single crystal without exception juts aggressively upward and to the right, remaining explicitly and mathematically parallel to one another, forming flawless local linear vectors with zero errant shards. The varying crystal density—from sparse shards to a hyper-dense thicket—represents extreme statistical weights. A blindingly bright star on the far left casts physically impossible, solidified dark-matter shadows that actively pierce and bleed directly towards the star itself in stark defiance of optical physics, maximizing spatial cognitive dissonance. Masterpiece, 8k.
visual_logic: Four varying-sized, elliptical asteroids strictly align along a downward luminous regression jet. Internally, mathematically parallel crystals jut upward-right with zero errant angles, representing perfectly consistent local vectors. Solidified dark-matter shadows piercing toward the light source maximize cognitive dissonance.
